# Product Spec Update without Evidence

## Allowed Paths
- docs/product/features/movement.md

## Machine-Readable Contract
```yaml
change_kind: product_spec_delta
issue_kind: implementation
```

## Summary
Updating movement spec but without any evidence, diff_rationale, or changed_requirement_id.

This should fail PS004 check because change_kind indicates spec delta but no evidence is provided.
